name: nexus-dev-studio
description: Nexus Dev Studio - Premium Web Development & Digital Solutions
author: Nexus Dev Studio

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.deploy: npm run install:all && npm run build && npm run start
